top_signals.title: Fed’s Paulson says ’healthy’ to consider rate hikes
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Bank of Philadelphia President Anna Paulson said on Tuesday it was “healthy” for financial markets to consider scenarios where the U.S. central bank may need to raise interest rates again, even as she said current monetary policy was appropriately restrictive. Speaking at the 2026 Financial Markets Conference in Amelia Island, Florida, Paulson said ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Neil Dutta on How Economists Are Missing the Macro Impact of AI
top_signals.summary: There’s more to it than just GDP accounting
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: OpenAI Is Preparing to File for an IPO in the Coming Weeks
top_signals.summary: OpenAI is preparing to file for an initial public offering in the coming weeks and is targeting a public debut sometime in the fall, according to a person familiar with the plan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Amid Record High Arrears, UN Struggling to Survive as Organization, Fifth Committee Hears as Speakers Present Proposals to Defer Return of Unspent Funds as Remedy
top_signals.summary: With its cash reserves rapidly depleting, and long-term financial stability eroding, the United Nations is not only risking its peace and development agenda, it is struggling to survive as an organization, delegates in the Fifth Committee (Administrative and Budgetary) warned today. The Secretary-General’s latest report on this matter provided sobering updates (document A/80/440/Add.1) — 2025 ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
